title: MonkeyWare
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e08e6bcafa12e0502a8bb5ebb0ae471207227c.png)
**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v1.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
> 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Custom, Service, Custom Color, 32x, Monkeys, Funny

**Description:**
> MonkeyWare is another texture pack I was commissioned to create (yes, I was paid for this one!). This time, the theme revolves around monkeys—an animal many people see as cute, funny, or however they choose to interpret it. Either way, monkeys are a big part of internet culture! This texture pack can be considered a "brown" pack but with a shiny, metallic finish.

> If you’re a fan of monkeys, this pack is definitely for you!

> This texture pack is designed for Netherite only, but you can download the diamond version here!

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv> 

![Compatible with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960c76ddd8a7ab7c7e79ad788f87bc2899f76960_0.webp)
- You can download Apple Skin here: [Download Apple Skin (Modrinth)](<https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin>)
- You can download Fabric Sky Boxes here: [Download Fabric Sky Boxes (Modrinth)](<https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes>)
